summary: Bloodwork profile section (backend+frontend), fixed PATCH->PUT profile bug, OCR label scan via Gemini Vision (backend+frontend)
Family Profiles: FamilyMember model, ?memberId scoping on profile/cabinet, switcher UI, member management modal
Deal finder UI: Find Deals button + collapsible panel in cabinet showing AI buying tips per supplement (platform badge + tips text). Closed #54, marked Supplement 特價 Checker as Done on board.

Schedule API+UI: GET /cabinet/schedule endpoint + /schedule page with time-slot cards. Dark mode persistence with ThemeProvider+ThemeToggle. Wellness score API (Gemini-based scoring). Onboarding checklist. All closed/merged.

Added stack-builder and seasonal-recommendations endpoints to backend (POST /cabinet/stack-builder, GET /cabinet/seasonal-recommendations). Built Stack Builder UI page at /stack-builder with grouped priority cards, inline add-to-cabinet. Added to Dashboard quick actions.

Added restock-alerts endpoint + quantity tracking fields to CabinetItem. Also completed Quick Scan UI (mobile camera capture + 10MB check). Background agent completed AI Timing Optimizer (GET /cabinet/schedule/optimized).
Added restock tracking fields to CabinetItemModal (qty remaining, daily doses, threshold) and amber low-supply badge on cabinet cards.
Added seasonal recommendations collapsible card to stack-builder page (GET /cabinet/seasonal-recommendations).
Completed: bloodwork endpoints, AI context enrichment in chat, intake streak API, user settings API, journal trends chart, streak tracker UI. All deployed to recallth-backend.fly.dev.
AI chat auto-title+summary: added summary field to Conversation schema, async Gemini title generation after first exchange, GET /chat/history returns summary. PR#94 merged.
GET /cabinet/redundancies: AI supplement redundancy detector with Gemini, 1h in-memory cache per user, bust on cabinet writes. PR#95 merged.
Redundancy detector UI panel on cabinet page. Fetches GET /cabinet/redundancies, collapsible panel, risk badges (low/moderate/high), cache bust on mutations. PR#139 merged.

prompt: i18n: translate hardcoded English nav labels across 9 pages
summary: Updated 9 pages to use t(labelKey) via useT() hook, added missing nav keys to all 3 locale files, created AppNav shared component

prompt: Add PRODUCT.md documenting all 14 features with acceptance criteria
summary: Created PRODUCT.md at repo root covering all pages: auth, dashboard, cabinet, schedule, chat, history, journal, bloodwork, side-effects, doctor-prep, stack-builder, profile, notifications, onboarding

prompt: i18n cabinet page — translate all hardcoded English strings
summary: Added ~45 new cabinet locale keys to en/zh-HK/zh-TW, updated cabinet/page.tsx with t() calls covering ~60 strings, removed unused frequency/timing helpers

prompt: fix chat extraction shape mismatch — ExtractionToast never showed
summary: Backend: toFrontendExtraction() maps ExtractionResult to {profile, cabinet} shape. Frontend: re-fetch profile after extraction so AI context panel updates

Added journal (31 keys) and bloodwork (28 keys) locale sections to en/zh-HK/zh-TW; replaced all hardcoded strings in journal/page.tsx and bloodwork/page.tsx; used component-level translated arrays for mood/energy labels; added useT() to AddEntryForm and MarkerChart sub-components

Added history (26 new keys merged into existing section) and schedule (31 keys) locale sections to en/zh-HK/zh-TW; translated all strings in history/page.tsx and schedule/page.tsx; used labelKey pattern for module-level constant arrays; added useT() to 9 sub-components

prompt: i18n: translate Side Effects and Notifications pages
summary: Added sideEffects (19 keys) and notifications (20 keys) locale sections to en/zh-HK/zh-TW; translated side-effects and notifications pages; SEVERITY_MAP reuses reactions.severity* keys; EMAIL_DIGEST_DAYS intentionally untranslated as backend values

prompt: i18n: translate Stack Builder and Doctor Prep pages
summary: Added stackBuilder (24 keys) and doctorPrep (26 keys) locale sections to en/zh-HK/zh-TW; translated stack-builder and doctor-prep pages; CI fix needed: missing Translations export when building en.ts

prompt: close QA tracking issue #122 — all i18n sub-issues complete
summary: Closed #122 after verifying all 5 sub-issues (#126-#130) merged with CI passing; tsc validates all translation keys; Playwright UAT blocked by MCP browser unavailable
Added POST /bloodwork/analyse backend endpoint (Gemini AI) + BloodworkAIPanel frontend component with markers of note, supplement adjustments, what to watch — full i18n
POST /insights/daily-brief backend with InsightCache model (24h TTL) + DailyBrief component on dashboard with loading/error/empty states
Client-side search on history conversations tab — filter by title/firstMessage, zero-results state, i18n in all 3 locales
Added DoseLog model + schedule endpoints (log-dose POST/DELETE, dose-logs GET), schedule page backend hydration, AdherenceHistory component showing 7-day panel with weekly adherence %
Added FirstSupplementModal (4-field form + AI insight state), OnboardingChecklist Start here button, POST /cabinet/first-insight Gemini endpoint returning uses/timing/notes, i18n in 3 locales
Added POST /insights/journal-insights (24h cache, Gemini, 2-3 bullet insights), JournalInsights component with violet styling, rate-limit/insufficient-data states, i18n in 3 locales

prompt: Issue #162: Cabinet supplement evidence deep-dive panel
summary: Added GET /cabinet/:id/research (7-day cache, Gemini, grade/findings/dosage/citations), cabinet page lazy-fetch accordion with rich indigo panel, DeepResearchData types, i18n in 3 locales
Added GoalCheckIn model + /goals routes (backend), /goals page with sparklines + check-in modal + AI coach response (frontend), i18n en/zh, dashboard Goals nav link

Added /health-report page with print-optimised 4-section layout (cabinet, interactions, profile, bloodwork), download link on doctor-prep page, full i18n including doctorPrep.downloadReport and bloodwork.downloadReport
Added HighlightText component with mark tag highlighting and Escape key handler to conversation search in /history page
Added addAnotherReading hint text for single-reading bloodwork cards; full recharts trend charts were already implemented
Added Mark as refilled button to restock alert widget, handleMarkRefilled function, and i18n keys; core backend + UI was already built
Full-stack weekly digest: WeeklyDigest Mongoose model + GET /digest endpoint with Gemini + MongoDB caching + /digest frontend page with week nav, stat pills, summary/suggestion, low-data state

prompt: Smart notification scheduling — auto-suggest reminder times based on supplement schedule (#161)
summary: Added suggested reminders section to notifications page: derives time slots from supplement schedule, per-slot toggle + editable time, accept-all button, in-app toast via setInterval; added i18n for en/zh-HK/zh-TW
Added BodyStatEntry Mongoose model + POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /body-stats CRUD routes with date filtering and limit cap; registered in index.ts
Added POST /bloodwork/interpret with per-marker Gemini analysis, trend detection, personalised insights, 24h InsightCache caching
Added QuickLogSheet bottom sheet + FAB on dashboard: mood/energy (journal upsert), supplement checklist (visual), body weight (body-stats API); i18n en/zh-HK/zh-TW

prompt: Bloodwork AI interpretation panel with per-marker insights (#174)
summary: Added BloodworkInterpretPanel component using POST /bloodwork/interpret with overall summary, per-marker status/priority/insight/recommendation/supplement cards, 24h cache display, and full i18n (en/zh-HK/zh-TW)
Added optional refLow/refHigh to BloodworkEntry; form fields with lab-report hint; chart dashed reference lines in sky blue; AI prompt uses user ranges; Custom range badge on chart/entries
Added PUT+DELETE /journal/logs/:id endpoints; journal past entries inline edit (emoji pickers + textarea) + delete confirm; side-effects delete confirm per card; full i18n

prompt: Goals: support multiple goals with individual progress tracking (#177)
summary: ProfileGoals.primaryGoal replaced with primary: string[] array; Goals page adds per-goal cards with delete/add; Profile page gets GoalsCategorySection multi-goal editor
POST /chat now accepts language override param (en/zh-HK/zh-TW), passed to processChat() bypassing detectLanguage(); AppShell.jsx deleted (unused)
Merged feature/ui-update via PR #65: Cabinet 4-col grid, CabinetDetail side-by-side, nameZh in CabinetAdd+Detail, full i18n coverage, SuppCard variants, Chat image input

Completed #53 (chat language override), #56 (AppShell cleanup), #52 (responsive desktop layout), #54 (bilingual names). #55 QA skipped (Playwright MCP offline). Background agent running for #180 (cross-data insights).

prompt: feat: profile import from LinkedIn URL and government ID scan (#402)
summary: Added LinkedIn URL and ID scan import methods to ProfileQuickFillModal; new /api/profile/import-linkedin and /api/profile/import-id routes; 5/hr rate limit; Haiku vision for ID, never stored

prompt: feat: inline profile gap prompts — contextual slide-over when autofill can't fill a field (#422)
summary: Added clickable Add to profile badge on skipped fields; ProfileGapSlideOver component; PATCH /api/profile for single-key merge; re-runs autofill after save; localStorage dismissal on manual edit
Correction toast now fires at confidence>=0.5 + auto-dismisses in 5s; /api/profile/learn writes to both FormMemory and profile; CorrectionsReviewModal shown before export
Fixed cron to send 7d/2d/day-of milestones exactly once each per form; updated PRODUCT.md with feature docs
Accept/reject buttons 32→44px on mobile, min-h-[44px] on Autofill/Export, hide keyboard shortcuts on mobile, pb-24 to prevent sticky bar overlap
